name: HTTP Request
description: The `http_request` component lets you make HTTP/HTTPS requests. To do so, you need to add it to your device's configuration:

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Buffer Size RX
config_entries.description: Change HTTP receive buffer size. Defaults to `512`.

config_entries.label: Buffer Size TX
config_entries.description: Change HTTP transmit buffer size. Defaults to `512`.

config_entries.label: Ca Certificate Path
config_entries.description: Path to a CA certificate bundle. Not required on MacOS (the inbuilt CA bundle is used and SSL enabled by default).

config_entries.label: Esp8266 Disable SSL Support
config_entries.description: Determines whether to include HTTPS/SSL support in the firmware binary. Excluding the SSL libraries from your build will result in a smaller binary, which may be necessary for memory-constrained devices (512 kB or 1 MB). If you see `Error: ESP does not have enough space to store OTA file` in your device's logs, you may need to enable this option. Defaults to `false`. By setting this option to `true`  :

config_entries.label: Follow Redirects
config_entries.description: Enable following HTTP redirects. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Redirect Limit
config_entries.description: Maximum amount of redirects to follow when enabled. Defaults to `3`.

config_entries.label: TLS Buffer Size RX
config_entries.description: Change TLS receive buffer size. Should be set to `16384` to fit the TLS record size of modern HTTP servers. This will increase RAM usage significantly and may require removing other components to free up RAM. You can check the max free heap block using the [Debug Component](https://esphome.io/components/debug/). If the server is configured to support the MFL TLS extension then this can be reduced, but most popular servers (Traefik, Caddy, Cloudflare) don't support it and nginx has it disabled by default. Defaults to `512`.

config_entries.label: TLS Buffer Size TX
config_entries.description: Change TLS transmit buffer size. Defaults to `512`.

config_entries.label: Useragent
config_entries.description: User-Agent header for requests. Defaults to `ESPHome/<version> (https://esphome.io)` where `<version>` is the version of ESPHome the device is running. For example: `ESPHome/2024.6.0 (https://esphome.io)`

config_entries.label: Verify SSL
config_entries.description: When set to `true` (default), SSL/TLS certificates will be validated upon connection; if invalid, the connection will be aborted. To accomplish this, ESP-IDF's default ESP x509 certificate bundle is included in the build. This certificate bundle includes the complete list of root certificates from Mozilla's NSS root certificate store. **Supported on ESP32 only; must be explicitly set to false on other platforms.**

config_entries.label: Watchdog Timeout
config_entries.description: Change the watchdog timeout during connection/data transfer. May be useful on slow connections or connections with high latency. **Do not change this value unless you are experiencing device reboots due to watchdog timeouts;** doing so may prevent the device from rebooting due to a legitimate problem. **Only available on ESP32 and RP2040**.
